title: Two must have features for Monday forms.

posts.author: WraithMBE (Berke Ertugrul)
posts.cookedHtml:
There needs to be two more options to add into the forms.

One is, when requesting a text in a section within the form. There has to be an option to make the text box appear paragraph sized. not just one row in height.

Secondly, we found ourselves wanting to add a only-read text as a warning. I know there are read only texts under the title of the form and when the user submits their form. But as we are facing consumers. It would be best to put our warning texts inside the form just like a section. And even maybe add a verification part where the user will check or click “I understand”.

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey

Nachliel from Easyapps here

In order to add a multi line input box in a form you can use the Large Text Column instead of the regular Text Column.

Regardless, if you are interested in creating styled forms that better match your brand and embed perfectly in you web page you can check out our monday.com app Easyform and our extensive documentation site.

The info box feature that you requested is in our pipeline and you can contact us directly for more info.
